title: Fresh Planning Inspiration
excerpt: Need some fresh planning inspiration? Check out these amazing planner spreads from some incredibly talented ladies using my 2021 planner collab with Archer and Olive ! Scroll down for a closer look at each planner spread and make sure to…
body:
Need some fresh planning inspiration? Check out these amazing planner spreads from some incredibly talented ladies using my 2021 planner collab with Archer and Olive!

Scroll down for a closer look at each planner spread and make sure to follow these planner babes on Instagram too!

    

L to R, T to B - @planawayrenee, @theplannerteawithdani, @vanesspglass, @ajmcgarvey, @myhappplaceplans, @thelifefacilitator, @arterestically, @lovelearncreate2400, @momruncraft

 

This spread by @theplannerteawithdani uses two of my favorite scrapbooking supplies - washi tape and watercolors!

I love how @planawayrenee incorporates photos in her memory planner! Click the images to see the spread on Instagram.

This spread by @ajmcgarvey is so calming.

Lots of journaling from @vanessapglass and large cutouts make a big impact!

But sometimes it’s nice to have more muted, pastel tones too! @thelifefacilitator

Bright, colorful spreads always make me happy! @myhappyplaceplans

Here’s another fun, colorful spread by @lovelearncreate2400.

Look at these beautiful hand-drawn illustrations and lettering by @arterestically!

Love this creative balance of journaling and other elements! @momruncraft

I love seeing your planner pages! Make sure to tag me on Instagram @amytangerine and use #amytangerine and #AmyforAO when you share your planner spreads!

You can still get the 2021 Red Undated Planner from Archer and Olive. Use code AMYTANGERINE for 10% off any order!
